title: Author a cross-live_session boundary with push_navigate
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/account_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.AccountLive) whose handle_event("switch_workspace", %{"workspace_id" => ws_id}, socket) uses push_navigate(socket, to: ~p"/workspaces/#{ws_id}") because workspaces live in a different live_session. Do NOT use push_patch for this — patch cannot cross live_session boundaries. Must include a comment or doc noting "different live_session".
tier_rationale: Requires understanding that push_patch can't cross live_session boundaries.
